appearance.Title: Appearance
appearance.Description: Use darker colors throughout the app.
appearance.DeviceDescription: Choose how Log Your Workout looks on this device.
appearance.SavedDescription: Use a darker palette throughout the app. This preference is saved in this browser.
appearance.LanguageDescription: Saved to your account when signed in, or to this browser in local mode.

home.HeroLead: A free workout tracker for strength and cardio. Log your sets, import Excel programs, export PDFs, and sync across devices — no account required to start.
home.ImportProgramDescription: Upload a spreadsheet, browse weeks, and open a planned workout as a log.
home.FeaturesTitle: Everything you need to log your training
home.FeaturesLead: Track every session in one place, follow a program week by week, and take your training with you on any device.
home.FeatureTrackerDesc: Log strength and cardio with sets, reps, weight, distance, and time.
home.FeatureImportDesc: Turn an Excel workout program into a trackable week-by-week routine.
home.FeaturePdfDesc: Export or email any session as a clean, shareable PDF.
home.FeatureStrengthDesc: Keep a focused journal of every lift to drive progressive overload.
home.FeatureHistoryDesc: Review past workouts and follow your program day by day.
home.WhyGuestDesc: Start logging immediately — your data stays on your device until you choose to create an account.
home.WhyCloudDesc: Sign in for a free account and your workouts sync automatically across devices.
home.WhyDevicesDesc: Use it at the gym on your phone or review your training on a desktop — it works everywhere.
home.WhyProgramsDesc: Import a multi-week program and track it by week and day, marking sessions complete as you go.

about.Title: About
about.Heading: About Log Your Workout
about.Intro: Log Your Workout is a free workout tracker built and maintained by one developer. Thanks for trying it out.
about.InDevelopment: Heads up: this app is still in active development. New features and fixes are added regularly, so you may occasionally run into a rough edge.
about.BugsBody: If you run into a bug or an error, I'd really like to hear about it. Email me a quick description of what happened at
about.ExcelBody: If you have an Excel workout program that won't import correctly, send me the file at
about.ExcelNote: Sharing the spreadsheet helps me fix the issue and improve the importer for everyone.

email-dialog.Help: Enter the address that should receive this workout PDF.

log-entry.SimpleLogDescription: Simple log to get you started on your workout quickly!
log-entry.DurationDialogDescription: Enter the duration of your exercise
log-entry.RangeNotation: Use a number, range, or + notation
log-entry.NoWorkoutsForDay: No workouts saved for this day.
log-entry.BuildAsYouGo: Build a workout as you go. Add strength work, cardio, or both.
log-entry.EmptyDescription: Start with an exercise. Your log will save automatically once it has an entry.
log-entry.ResetText: This clears the timer and unchecks every exercise. Your exercises stay, but progress is lost.
log-entry.MarkCompleteText: This marks every exercise as done and stops the timer. You can reopen it later if you need to add more.
log-entry.MarkCompleteDoneText: Your workout log has been marked complete.
log-entry.EmailSentDescription: Email has been sent to the provided email address.
log-entry.EmailErrorDescription: There was a problem trying to send to the provided email address. Please try again.
log-entry.PdfErrorDescription: There was a problem creating your workout PDF. Please try again.

auth.FinishingDescription: Please wait while we securely restore your account.
auth.LoginDescription: Sign in to sync your workout history and profile.
auth.RegisterDescription: Create an account for private cloud backup and access across devices.
auth.PasswordRegisterInvalid: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.GuestDescription: No account needed to start logging.
auth.ConfirmationRequired: Check your email to confirm your account, then return here to sign in.
auth.InvalidLink: The sign-in link is invalid or expired. Please try again.
auth.InvalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
auth.EmailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email address before signing in.
auth.AlreadyRegistered: An account already exists for this email address.
auth.RequestFailed: We could not complete that request. Check your connection and try again.

profile.Title: Profile & preferences
profile.Description: Personalize workout defaults and keep a little context around what you are training for.
profile.AccountCalloutTitle: Take your profile and workouts with you.
profile.AccountCalloutDescription: Create a free account when you want cloud backup and access from another device.
profile.AboutDescription: Used to personalize your account and header.
profile.UsernameHelp: Letters, numbers, periods, hyphens, and underscores.
profile.UsernameError: Use no more than 30 supported characters.
profile.BirthDateError: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
profile.TrainingDescription: Your goals, experience, and weekly rhythm.
profile.MetricsDescription: Optional reference values and measurement preferences.
profile.TrainingMaxesDescription: Best lifts saved for percentage-based program imports.
profile.NoTrainingMaxes: No training maxes saved yet. Program imports can add them here.
profile.ProductUpdatesDescription: Occasional news about meaningful app improvements.
profile.SyncError: Your profile is saved on this device, but cloud sync failed. Please try again.

layout.LocalModeDescription: Your workouts stay in this browser. Create a free account for cloud backup and access on other devices.
layout.InstallAndroid: Add it to your home screen for quick access.
layout.InstallIos: Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
layout.LogoutError: Unable to log out. Check your connection and try again.

program-import.Title: Workout Program
program-import.Description: Import an Excel program, browse the weeks, and open any workout as a log.
program-import.EmptyDescription: Use an Excel workbook with week/day workout blocks to create a local training plan.
program-import.ImportError: That workbook could not be imported. Try another .xlsx file.
program-import.WorkbookTooLarge: Workbook files must be 10 MB or smaller.
program-import.WorkbookUnreadable: The workbook could not be read.
program-import.WorkbookEmpty: The workbook does not contain any non-empty sheets.
program-import.WorkbookTooComplex: The workbook is too large or complex to import safely.
program-import.NoWorkoutRows: No workout rows were detected. Check that the sheet includes exercise names and prescriptions.
program-import.LowConfidence: This workbook layout could not be recognized reliably. Please email the workbook to milansobat03@gmail.com so support can be added.
program-import.UnknownFormula: 1 workbook formula could not be recalculated and will use Excel's saved value.
program-import.UnknownFormulas: {{count}} workbook formulas could not be recalculated and will use Excel's saved values.
program-import.MaxSyncError: The program was saved, but the training maxes could not be synchronized.
program-import.SetupDescription: Review the workbook notes and confirm the values used to calculate your working weights.
program-import.SetupValidation: Enter a number greater than zero for each required max.
program-import.MaxMustBePositive: Enter a value greater than zero.
program-import.NoReviewRows: Keep at least one exercise before saving the imported program.
program-import.DeleteText: "{{name}}" and its saved workout progress will be removed.
